file.content:
# Nuxt Minimal Starter

Look at the [Nuxt documentation](https://nuxt.com/docs/getting-started/introduction) to learn more.

## Setup

Make sure to install dependencies:

```bash
# npm
npm install

# pnpm
pnpm install

# yarn
yarn install

# bun
bun install
```

## Development Server

Start the development server on `http://localhost:3000`:

```bash
# npm
npm run dev

# pnpm
pnpm dev

# yarn
yarn dev

# bun
bun run dev
```

## Production

Build the application for production:

```bash
# npm
npm run build

# pnpm
pnpm build

# yarn
yarn build

# bun
bun run build
```

Locally preview production build:

```bash
# npm
npm run preview

# pnpm
pnpm preview

# yarn
yarn preview

# bun
bun run preview
```

Check out the [deployment documentation](https://nuxt.com/docs/getting-started/deployment) for more information.

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me proceed with the cleanup:

1. Remove tests/e2e/ directory
2. Remove tests/unit/ directory
3. Remove tests/test-reports/ directory
4. Remove tests/ directory
5. Remove playwright.config.ts and playwright.e2e.config.ts
6. Remove @playwright/test from devDependencies in package.json
7. Remove test and test:e2e scripts from package.json
8. Check if dotenv is used only by tests (it doesn't appear in package.json so no action needed)
9. Run npm install
10. Add testing note to README.md


11. Commit the changes

tool_use_result.originalFile:
# Nuxt Minimal Starter

Look at the [Nuxt documentation](https://nuxt.com/docs/getting-started/introduction) to learn more.

## Setup

Make sure to install dependencies:

```bash
# npm
npm install

# pnpm
pnpm install

# yarn
yarn install

# bun
bun install
```

## Development Server

Start the development server on `http://localhost:3000`:

```bash
# npm
npm run dev

# pnpm
pnpm dev

# yarn
yarn dev

# bun
bun run dev
```

## Production

Build the application for production:

```bash
# npm
npm run build

# pnpm
pnpm build

# yarn
yarn build

# bun
bun run build
```

Locally preview production build:

```bash
# npm
npm run preview

# pnpm
pnpm preview

# yarn
yarn preview

# bun
bun run preview
```

Check out the [deployment documentation](https://nuxt.com/docs/getting-started/deployment) for more information.

content.text:
## Status
DONE

## What Changed
- `tests/` — removed entirely (e2e specs, unit specs, test-reports)
- `playwright.config.ts` — deleted
- `playwright.e2e.config.ts` — deleted
- `package.json` — removed `test` and `test:e2e` scripts; removed `@playwright/test` devDependency
- `package-lock.json` — updated by `npm install` after dependency removal
- `README.md` — added `## Testing` section pointing to ohmydoc-qa repo

## Key Decisions
- `dotenv` was not present in `package.json`, so no action needed there
- Removed `tests/test-reports/` alongside the spec directories since it was also stale test output

result:
## Status
DONE

## What Changed
- `tests/` — removed entirely (e2e specs, unit specs, test-reports)
- `playwright.config.ts` — deleted
- `playwright.e2e.config.ts` — deleted
- `package.json` — removed `test` and `test:e2e` scripts; removed `@playwright/test` devDependency
- `package-lock.json` — updated by `npm install` after dependency removal
- `README.md` — added `## Testing` section pointing to ohmydoc-qa repo

## Key Decisions
- `dotenv` was not present in `package.json`, so no action needed there
- Removed `tests/test-reports/` alongside the spec directories since it was also stale test output
